visuals.title: Semaphores in OS
visuals.description: Animated visual covering semaphore concept (counter variable S), binary semaphore for mutual exclusion, counting semaphore for resource management, wait/signal pseudocode, and summary of semaphore benefits.
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="400" viewBox="0 0 420 400" data-topic-id="semaphores">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bgGrad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E8EAF6"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#C5CAE9"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="400" fill="url(#bgGrad)" rx="12"/>
  <g data-narration="Semaphores are integer-based synchronization tools used by the OS to control access to shared resources among concurrent processes." opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
    <text x="210" y="22" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="14" font-weight="bold" fill="#283593">Semaphores in OS</text>
    <line x1="100" y1="28" x2="320" y2="28" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="4,2"/>
  </g>
  <g data-narration="A semaphore S is an integer counter variable. The wait operation decrements S and blocks the process if S is less than zero. The signal operation increments S and wakes a blocked process if any are waiting." opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
    <rect x="10" y="34" width="400" height="62" rx="6" fill="white" fill-opacity="0.5" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="0.8"/>
    <text x="20" y="48" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="#3949AB">Semaphore Concept: Integer Counter S</text>
    <rect x="170" y="52" width="80" height="36" rx="5" fill="#3949AB" stroke="#283593" stroke-width="1"/>
    <text x="210" y="67" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="white">S = 3</text>
    <text x="210" y="82" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="#C5CAE9">(counter)</text>
    <polygon points="150,60 156,60 153,70" fill="#C62828"/>
    <rect x="145" y="52" width="16" height="8" rx="1" fill="#C62828"/>
    <text x="120" y="55" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7.5" fill="#C62828">wait(S)</text>
    <text x="120" y="64" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="6.5" fill="#C62828">S--</text>
    <text x="120" y="73" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="6.5" fill="#C62828">if S<0</text>
    <text x="120" y="82" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="6.5" fill="#C62828" font-weight="bold">BLOCK</text>
    <polygon points="265,70 271,70 268,60" fill="#2E7D32"/>
    <rect x="262" y="70" width="16" height="8" rx="1" fill="#2E7D32"/>
    <text x="305" y="55" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7.5" fill="#2E7D32">signal(S)</text>
    <text x="305" y="64" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="6.5" fill="#2E7D32">S++</text>
    <text x="305" y="73" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="6.5" fill="#2E7D32">if S<=0</text>
    <text x="305" y="82" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="6.5" fill="#2E7D32" font-weight="bold">WAKE</text>
    <text x="48" y="90" font-family="Arial" font-size="6.5" fill="#3949AB" font-style="italic">Decrement and possibly block</text>
    <text x="270" y="90" font-family="Arial" font-size="6.5" fill="#3949AB" font-style="italic">Increment and possibly wake</text>
  </g>
  <g data-narration="A binary semaphore, also called a mutex, can only hold values 0 or 1. It provides mutual exclusion so that only one process enters the critical section at a time. Here process P1 acquires the lock while P2 waits." opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="3.0s" fill="freeze"/>
    <rect x="10" y="100" width="400" height="62" rx="6" fill="white" fill-opacity="0.5" stroke="#00695C" stroke-width="0.8"/>
    <text x="20" y="114" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="#00695C">Binary Semaphore (Mutex) — Value: 0 or 1</text>
    <rect x="20" y="120" width="55" height="22" rx="4" fill="#26A69A" stroke="#00695C" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text x="47" y="134" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" font-weight="bold" fill="white">P1</text>
    <line x1="75" y1="131" x2="115" y2="131" stroke="#00695C" stroke-width="1.2"/>
    <rect x="118" y="118" width="70" height="28" rx="4" fill="#00695C" stroke="#004D40" stroke-width="1"/>
    <text x="153" y="130" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" fill="white">mutex=1</text>
    <text x="153" y="140" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="6.5" fill="#B2DFDB">OPEN</text>
    <line x1="188" y1="131" x2="218" y2="131" stroke="#00695C" stroke-width="1.2"/>
    <rect x="220" y="118" width="80" height="28" rx="4" fill="#E8F5E9" stroke="#00695C" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="3,2"/>
    <text x="260" y="130" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" font-weight="bold" fill="#00695C">Critical</text>
    <text x="260" y="140" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" font-weight="bold" fill="#00695C">Section</text>
    <rect x="20" y="146" width="55" height="12" rx="3" fill="#80CBC4" stroke="#00695C" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text x="47" y="155" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="#004D40">P2 (wait)</text>
    <line x1="75" y1="152" x2="115" y2="152" stroke="#C62828" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="2,2"/>
    <text x="95" y="148" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="6" fill="#C62828">blocked</text>
    <text x="315" y="124" font-family="Arial" font-size="7.5" fill="#00695C" font-style="italic">Only 1 process</text>
    <text x="315" y="134" font-family="Arial" font-size="7.5" fill="#00695C" font-style="italic">in CS at a time</text>
    <text x="315" y="148" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="#C62828" font-weight="bold">Mutual Exclusion</text>
  </g>
  <g data-narration="A counting semaphore can hold values greater than 1 and is used for managing a pool of identical resources. Here 3 resources are available. As processes P1, P2, and P3 acquire them, the semaphore count decreases from 3 to 0. Process P4 must wait." opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="4.5s" fill="freeze"/>
    <rect x="10" y="166" width="400" height="62" rx="6" fill="white" fill-opacity="0.5" stroke="#E65100" stroke-width="0.8"/>
    <text x="20" y="180" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="#E65100">Counting Semaphore — Resource Pool</text>
    <rect x="20" y="186" width="30" height="18" rx="3" fill="#FF8A65" stroke="#E65100" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text x="35" y="198" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="white">R1</text>
    <rect x="54" y="186" width="30" height="18" rx="3" fill="#FF8A65" stroke="#E65100" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text x="69" y="198" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="white">R2</text>
    <rect x="88" y="186" width="30" height="18" rx="3" fill="#FF8A65" stroke="#E65100" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text x="103" y="198" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="white">R3</text>
    <text x="128" y="198" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#E65100" font-weight="bold">→</text>
    <rect x="145" y="185" width="36" height="20" rx="3" fill="#E65100"/>
    <text x="163" y="198" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" fill="white">S=3</text>
    <text x="186" y="198" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#E65100">→</text>
    <rect x="195" y="185" width="36" height="20" rx="3" fill="#EF6C00"/>
    <text x="213" y="198" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" fill="white">S=2</text>
    <text x="236" y="198" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#E65100">→</text>
    <rect x="245" y="185" width="36" height="20" rx="3" fill="#F57C00"/>
    <text x="263" y="198" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" fill="white">S=1</text>
    <text x="286" y="198" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#E65100">→</text>
    <rect x="295" y="185" width="36" height="20" rx="3" fill="#FF9800"/>
    <text x="313" y="198" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" fill="#BF360C">S=0</text>
    <text x="152" y="218" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="6.5" fill="#E65100">P1 gets</text>
    <text x="202" y="218" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="6.5" fill="#E65100">P2 gets</text>
    <text x="252" y="218" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="6.5" fill="#E65100">P3 gets</text>
    <text x="308" y="218" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="6.5" fill="#C62828" font-weight="bold">P4 waits!</text>
    <text x="345" y="188" font-family="Arial" font-size="7.5" fill="#E65100" font-style="italic">S tracks available</text>
    <text x="345" y="198" font-family="Arial" font-size="7.5" fill="#E65100" font-style="italic">resource count</text>
  </g>
  <g data-narration="The wait operation, also called P or down, tests the semaphore: while S is less than or equal to zero the process busy-waits, then decrements S. The signal operation, also called V or up, simply increments S. These are executed atomically." opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="6.0s" fill="freeze"/>
    <rect x="10" y="232" width="400" height="72" rx="6" fill="white" fill-opacity="0.5" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="0.8"/>
    <text x="210" y="246" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="#3949AB">wait() and signal() — Pseudocode (Atomic Operations)</text>
    <rect x="18" y="252" width="185" height="46" rx="4" fill="#1A237E" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text x="28" y="264" font-family="monospace" font-size="7.5" fill="#7986CB">// P operation (down)</text>
    <text x="28" y="275" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" fill="#E8EAF6" font-weight="bold">wait(S) {</text>
    <text x="38" y="284" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" fill="#FFAB91">  while(S<=0); //busy wait</text>
    <text x="38" y="293" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" fill="#80CBC4">  S--;</text>
    <text x="175" y="293" text-anchor="end" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" fill="#E8EAF6" font-weight="bold">}</text>
    <rect x="215" y="252" width="185" height="46" rx="4" fill="#1A237E" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text x="225" y="264" font-family="monospace" font-size="7.5" fill="#7986CB">// V operation (up)</text>
    <text x="225" y="275" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" fill="#E8EAF6" font-weight="bold">signal(S) {</text>
    <text x="235" y="284" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" fill="#80CBC4">  S++;</text>
    <text x="372" y="293" text-anchor="end" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" fill="#E8EAF6" font-weight="bold">}</text>
  </g>
  <g data-narration="In summary, semaphores solve three key problems: mutual exclusion ensures only one process accesses a critical section, ordering enforces execution sequence between processes, and resource counting manages a finite pool of identical resources." opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="7.5s" fill="freeze"/>
    <rect x="10" y="310" width="400" height="82" rx="6" fill="white" fill-opacity="0.6" stroke="#283593" stroke-width="0.8"/>
    <text x="210" y="326" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="#283593">Semaphores Solve:</text>
    <rect x="25" y="334" width="115" height="50" rx="8" fill="#00695C"/>
    <text x="82" y="352" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" font-weight="bold" fill="white">Mutual</text>
    <text x="82" y="363" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" font-weight="bold" fill="white">Exclusion</text>
    <text x="82" y="378" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="6.5" fill="#B2DFDB">Binary semaphore</text>
    <rect x="152" y="334" width="115" height="50" rx="8" fill="#3949AB"/>
    <text x="209" y="352" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" font-weight="bold" fill="white">Process</text>
    <text x="209" y="363" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" font-weight="bold" fill="white">Ordering</text>
    <text x="209" y="378" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="6.5" fill="#C5CAE9">Enforce exec sequence</text>
    <rect x="279" y="334" width="115" height="50" rx="8" fill="#E65100"/>
    <text x="336" y="352" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" font-weight="bold" fill="white">Resource</text>
    <text x="336" y="363" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" font-weight="bold" fill="white">Counting</text>
    <text x="336" y="378" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="6.5" fill="#FFCCBC">Counting semaphore</text>
  </g>
</svg>

nodes.label:
Block process
Add to wait queue

Process sleeps until
signal() wakes it

Wake one blocked
process from queue
